title: The Basilisk Verdict
promise: A moral topology test between Moloch, Basilisk, and the Third Path. What form of power do you accept when freedom, safety, efficiency, and suffering conflict?
description: 12 dilemmas. No neutral options. Your verdict places you in one of seven archetypes on the spectrum between competitive acceleration, centralized governance, and pluralistic limits.
ogDescription: 12 dilemmas. Three minutes. What form of power do you accept? Private by design.
